forbidden_in_core: Gameplay ID or name special-cases in runtime logic
Gameplay-tuning constants embedded in runtime code
Keyword or alias mapping tables encoded directly in runtime handlers
Feature-specific branch families that bypass data/mod composition
allowed_in_core: Deterministic engine primitives and generic state transitions
Schema/version compatibility defaults that do not tune gameplay

checks.message: data-driven skip_last_consumable flag controls the_fool behavior (no hardcoded ID gate)
EffectOp execution is still branch-based in core runtime
hook dispatch uses HOOK_ACTIVATION_BINDINGS table (data-table pattern, not per-hook branches)
pack kind parsing matches against pack_kind strings from content (data-driven, not hardcoded enum)

allowlist.reason: Temporary during migration to data-driven operation registry; keep covered by effects matrix tests.
ActionOp dispatch is branch-based; migration deferred after EffectOp registry is complete.
